noveltyJustification: 6.5/8 findings fully new (F37 ranked table, F38-F43 cross-cuttings), 1.5/8 strong-extension (F44); raw novelty ~0.91 adjusted down for synthesis-not-evidence and +0.10 simplification bonus → 0.45

include iter-005 F26 per-language parser as standalone
combine F15 Cat A/B/C into one F37 row

summary: Top-K ranked remediation table: 11 load-bearing defects mapped to severity (2×P0, 7×P1, 2×P2), F36 closing benchmark, fix shape (surgical edit / refactor / new module), effort (5×S + 4×M + 2×L), and blast radius (isolated/subsystem/cross-system). Two P0s (F23.1 settings wiring, F33 corpus path) are both S-effort surgical edits.

F23.1 settings wiring bug INVALIDATES F25 legacy parity test (which tests adapters in isolation, not via settings interpreter) AND silently biases iter-4 diagnostic telemetry: Claude sessions emit runtime:'copilot' records, polluting iter-006 F29's runtime-aware metrics. F36 settings-driven-invocation-parity benchmark is the single highest-leverage CI coverage addition.

F33 corpus-path mismatch silently double-blocks RQ-02 calibration AND lane-ablation gating (F36 #2 and #8 both load labeled-prompts.jsonl). One-line fix has 2-benchmark blast radius; highest-ROI item in F37 table.

F17 vocabulary divergence multiplies F28 instrumentation cost: telemetry must emit 3 string fields per percentile sample (freshness + trustState + canonicalReadiness) and they fan across 5 vocabularies (V1-V5). Landing F37 #8 (vocabulary unification) before F37 #4 (latency instrumentation) prevents codifying divergence into a 4th surface.

F15 Cat C (rollback swallows cache-invalidation errors but reports rolledBack:true) + iter-2 INV-F5-V2 (generation bump without enforced fan-out) = two simultaneous independent routes to stale post-rollback cache. F37 #7 closes route 1 only. INV-F5-V2 should be promoted to P1 in F37 paired with #7, closed jointly by extending F36 concurrent-state-invariants.

F24 advisor cache `runtime` partitioning + F23.1 invocation bug interact: Claude sessions occasionally fire Copilot adapter, warming Copilot cache key instead of Claude. RollingCacheHitRate appears artificially low for Claude / high for Copilot in iter-006 F29 telemetry. F36 #7 cache-hit-ratio bench MUST land AFTER F37 #1 settings repair to avoid codifying contaminated baseline.

F28 + F36 #7 + F36 #8 share one instrumentation surface (percentile sink + per-key histogram + JSONL writer). Implementing F37 #4 first turns 3 M-effort items into 1 M + 2 S-effort items; saves ~2-3 person-days. Recommended order: F37 #2 → #1 → #4 → bench fan-out.

Severity sanity-check: only two P0 defects exist (F23.1 wiring + F33 corpus path); both are 1-3 line surgical edits. Day-1 remediation = repoint 1 corpus path line + rewrite 4 nested entries in `.claude/settings.local.json` = 5 lines that unblocks 6 of the 8 F36 benchmarks.
